LanguageData.Mechanitor.description:
You are a RobCo mechanic, trained to wake old-world robots and bend them to useful work. People are unreliable; machines are honest. You arrived in the wasteland with a control rig, a pocketful of salvage, and a small crew of utility bots ready to build something new.
Note: This scenario is challenging because your early strength is tied to robotics rather than raw manpower.
LanguageData.Mechanitor.label: RobCo Mechanic
